title: Walking in the Implicit: Interactive World Exploration via Neural Scene Representation
innovation_summary: Walking in the Implicit: Interactive World Exploration via Neural Scene Representation: We propose Walking in the Implicit, a scene-centric paradigm that changes the rollout variable from frame latents to a fixed-length, renderable implicit state, termed Neural Implicit.
